title: Papertek Framework for Education Lesson Data Schema
description: JSON Schema for lesson data files in the Papertek Framework for Education. Defines the structure for lesson content including dialog or article, learning goals, and metadata.

lines.text: Hallo! Ich heiße Lukas.
Hallo Lukas! Ich heiße Olivia.

checklist: Jeg kan hilse på noen på tysk
Jeg kan si hva jeg heter

lessonEntry.title: Lesson Entry
lessonEntry.description: A single lesson entry keyed by lesson ID (e.g., '1-1', '3-2'). Must contain either a dialog (language courses) or an article (non-language courses).

targetTitle.title: Target Language Title
targetTitle.description: The lesson title in the target language

learningGoals.title: Learning Goals
learningGoals.description: Array of learning objectives for the lesson in Norwegian

terms.title: Subject Terms
terms.description: Array of key terms and definitions for non-language courses (begrepstrening)

checklist.title: Self-Assessment Checklist
checklist.description: Array of self-assessment items for students, phrased as 'Jeg kan...' statements

dialogEntry.title: Dialog
dialogEntry.description: Lesson dialog with metadata and dialog lines

description.title: Dialog Description
description.description: Contextual description of the dialog in Norwegian

imageAlt.title: Image Alt Text
imageAlt.description: Accessible alt text for the image

lines.title: Dialog Lines
lines.description: Array of dialog lines spoken by characters

dialogLine.title: Dialog Line
dialogLine.description: A single line spoken by a character in the dialog

person.title: Speaker
person.description: Character key identifying who speaks this line (referenced from characters data file)

text.title: Text
text.description: The dialog text (may contain HTML word-lookup spans with data-type, data-verb, data-word, or data-noun attributes)

articleEntry.title: Article
articleEntry.description: Structured article content for non-language courses (science, math, etc.)

sections.title: Article Sections
sections.description: Array of content sections with headings and paragraphs

articleSection.title: Article Section
articleSection.description: A section within an article with heading and paragraphs

heading.title: Section Heading
heading.description: The heading text for this section

paragraphs.title: Paragraphs
paragraphs.description: Array of paragraph texts in the section

termEntry.title: Term
termEntry.description: A key term with definition for begrepstrening (term training)

term.title: Term
term.description: The key term or concept name

lessonMetadata.title: Lesson Metadata
lessonMetadata.description: Metadata for lessons used by the template generator, keyed by lesson ID

targetTitle.title: Target Language Title
targetTitle.description: The lesson title in the target language

spanishTitle.title: Spanish Title
spanishTitle.description: The lesson title in Spanish (optional, for multilingual support)

frenchTitle.title: French Title
frenchTitle.description: The lesson title in French (optional, for multilingual support)

hasExtraExercises.title: Has Extra Exercises
hasExtraExercises.description: Whether this lesson includes extra exercises

hasDialog.title: Has Dialog
hasDialog.description: Whether this lesson includes a dialog section

nextLesson.title: Next Lesson ID
nextLesson.description: The ID of the next lesson in sequence (e.g., '1-2')
